findings.title: Executes shell commands
findings.detail: Executes shell commands in .smithery/shttp/module.js. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Dynamic code evaluation (eval/Function)
findings.detail: Dynamic code evaluation (eval/Function) in .smithery/shttp/module.js. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Decoded data flows into code execution
findings.detail: .smithery/shttp/module.js decodes base64 and appears to execute it — a classic obfuscated-payload pattern.
